name: OWASP_A06_Vulnerable_Components_Scanning
search: index="web_logs" method IN ("GET", "POST", "HEAD") | search uri="*wp-content/plugins/*" OR uri="*phpmyadmin*" OR uri="*cgi-bin*" OR uri="*fckeditor*" OR uri="*jquery*1.*" OR uri="*solr*" OR uri="*log4j*" OR uri="*struts*" OR uri="*telerik*" | iplocation clientip | fillnull value="Unknown" Country, City | stats count as scan_count, values(uri) as attempted_urls, latest(_time) as last_seen by clientip, Country, City | fieldformat last_seen = strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval OWASP_Category="A06:2021-Vulnerable Components", Alert="Zəiflik (Vulnerability) Skanı Aşkarlandı" | sort - scan_count | table last_seen, clientip, Country, City, scan_count, attempted_urls, Alert
description: Köhnəlmiş komponentlərin (Log4j, phpMyAdmin, WordPress pluginləri və s.) skan edilməsini aşkarlayır.
